layout/base:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="no-js" lang="{{ locale_name }}">
    <head>
        <title>{{ head.title }}</title>
        {{{ resourceHints }}}
        {{{ head.meta_tags }}}
        {{{ head.config }}}
        {{#block "head"}} {{/block}}

        <link href="{{{ head.favicon }}}" rel="shortcut icon">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

        <script nonce="{{nonce}}">
            {{!-- Change document class from no-js to js so we can detect this in css --}}
            document.documentElement.className = document.documentElement.className.replace('no-js', 'js');
        </script>

        {{> components/common/polyfill-script }}
        <script nonce="{{nonce}}">window.consentManagerTranslations = `{{{langJson 'consent_manager'}}}`;</script>

        {{!-- Load Lazysizes script ASAP so images will appear --}}
        <script nonce="{{nonce}}">
            {{!-- Only load visible elements until the onload event fires, after which preload nearby elements. --}}
            window.lazySizesConfig = window.lazySizesConfig || {};
            window.lazySizesConfig.loadMode = 1;
        </script>
        <script nonce="{{nonce}}" async src="{{cdn 'assets/dist/theme-bundle.head_async.js' resourceHint='preload' as='script'}}"></script>
        
        {{getFontsCollection font-display='swap'}}
        
        <script nonce="{{nonce}}" async src="{{cdn 'assets/dist/theme-bundle.font.js' resourceHint='preload' as='script'}}"></script>

        {{{stylesheet '/assets/css/theme.css'}}}

        {{{head.scripts}}}

        {{~inject 'themeSettings' theme_settings}}
        {{~inject 'storefrontAPIToken' settings.storefront_api.token}}
        {{~inject 'zoomSize' theme_settings.zoom_size}}
        {{~inject 'productSize' theme_settings.product_size}}
        {{~inject 'genericError' (lang 'common.generic_error')}}
        {{~inject 'urls' urls}}
        {{~inject 'secureBaseUrl' settings.secure_base_url}}
        {{~inject 'cartId' cart_id}}
        {{~inject 'template' template}}
        {{~inject 'validationDictionaryJSON' (langJson 'validation_messages')}}
        {{~inject 'validationFallbackDictionaryJSON' (langJson 'validation_fallback_messages')}}
        {{~inject 'validationDefaultDictionaryJSON' (langJson 'validation_default_messages')}}
        {{~inject 'carouselArrowAndDotAriaLabel' (lang 'carousel.arrow_and_dot_aria_label')}}
        {{~inject 'carouselActiveDotAriaLabel' (lang 'carousel.active_dot_aria_label')}}
        {{~inject 'carouselContentAnnounceMessage' (lang 'carousel.content_announce_message')}}
        {{~inject 'giftWrappingRemoveMessage' (lang 'cart.gift_wrapping.remove_confirm')}}
    </head>
    <body class="page-type_{{page_type}}{{#if theme_settings.epic-toggle-search}} has--epic-search{{/if}}{{#if theme_settings.epic-toggle-sticky-header}} has--header-sticky{{/if}}{{#if theme_settings.epic-sitewide-message}} has--epic-sitewide{{/if}}">
        <svg data-src="{{cdn 'img/icon-sprite.svg'}}" class="icons-svg-sprite"></svg>

        {{> components/common/header }}
        {{> components/common/body }}
        {{> components/common/footer }}

        <script nonce="{{nonce}}">window.__webpack_public_path__ = "{{cdn 'assets/dist/'}}";</script>
        <script nonce="{{nonce}}">
            {{!-- Exported in app.js --}}
            function onThemeBundleMain() {
                window.stencilBootstrap("{{page_type}}", {{jsContext}}).load();

                function browserSupportsFormData() {
                    return typeof FormData !== 'undefined'
                        && !!FormData.prototype.keys;
                }
                function loadFormDataPolyfillScript(src) {
                    var formDataPolyfillScript = document.createElement('script');
                    formDataPolyfillScript.src = src;
                    formDataPolyfillScript.onerror = function () {
                        console.error('Failed to load formData polyfill script ' + src);
                    };
                    document.body.appendChild(formDataPolyfillScript);
                }

                if (!browserSupportsFormData()) {
                    loadFormDataPolyfillScript('{{cdn 'assets/dist/theme-bundle.polyfill_form_data.js'}}');
                }
            }
        </script>
        <script id="theme-bundle-main" nonce="{{nonce}}" async defer src="{{cdn 'assets/dist/theme-bundle.main.js' resourceHint='preload' as='script'}}"></script>
        <script nonce="{{nonce}}">
            const scriptElement = document.getElementById('theme-bundle-main');

            if (scriptElement) {
                addEventListener('load', onThemeBundleMain);
            } else {
                console.error('Could not find script element with id "theme-bundle-main"');
            }
        </script>

     
        <style>
#facetedSearch .facetedSearch-inlineMore {
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
}

#facetedSearch .facetedSearch-inlineSearch {
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

#facetedSearch .facetedSearch-inlineList {
    max-height: 24rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    padding-right: 0.25rem;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}
</style>

<script>
(function () {
    var SEARCH_THRESHOLD = 10;
    var refreshTimer = null;

    function getNavItems(navList) {
        return Array.prototype.filter.call(navList.children, function (child) {
            return child.classList && child.classList.contains('navList-item');
        });
    }

    function getFacetTitle(navList) {
        var block = navList.closest('.accordion-block');
        var titleEl = block ? block.querySelector('.accordion-title') : null;
        var text = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent : '';
        text = (text || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
        return text || navList.getAttribute('data-facet') || 'Filter';
    }

    function removeNode(node) {
        if (node && node.parentNode) {
            node.parentNode.removeChild(node);
        }
    }

    function insertDefaultSearch(navList) {
        var content = navList.closest('.accordion-content');
        var input;
        var field;
        var title;
        var needsSearch;

        if (!content) return;
        if (navList.closest('.facetedSearch-inlineMore')) return;
        if (content.querySelector('.facetedSearch-inlineSearch')) return;

        needsSearch =
            navList.getAttribute('data-has-more-results') === 'true' ||
            getNavItems(navList).length >= SEARCH_THRESHOLD;

        if (!needsSearch) return;

        title = getFacetTitle(navList);

        field = document.createElement('div');
        field.className = 'form-field facetedSearch-inlineSearch';

        input = document.createElement('input');
        input.className = 'form-input';
        input.type = 'search';
        input.placeholder = 'Enter ' + title + '...';
        input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Search ' + title);
        input.setAttribute('data-inline-search-target', navList.id);

        field.appendChild(input);
        content.insertBefore(field, navList);
    }

    function applyDefaultSearches(root) {
        var scope = root || document;
        var lists = scope.querySelectorAll('#facetedSearch .accordion-content .navList');

        Array.prototype.forEach.call(lists, function (navList) {
            insertDefaultSearch(navList);
        });
    }

    function buildTemplateList() {
        var body = document.body;

        if (body.classList.contains('page-type-category')) {
            return ['category/show-more', 'brand/show-more', 'search/show-more'];
        }

        if (body.classList.contains('page-type-brand')) {
            return ['brand/show-more', 'category/show-more', 'search/show-more'];
        }

        if (body.classList.contains('page-type-search')) {
            return ['search/show-more', 'category/show-more', 'brand/show-more'];
        }

        return ['category/show-more', 'brand/show-more', 'search/show-more'];
    }

    function fetchShowMoreHtml(template, facetName) {
        var url = window.location.pathname + window.location.search;
        var headers = {
            'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
            'stencil-config': '{}',
            'stencil-options': JSON.stringify({ render_with: template }),
            'x-requested-with': 'stencil-utils',
            'x-xsrf-token': window.BCData && window.BCData.csrf_token ? window.BCData.csrf_token : ''
        };

        url += (url.indexOf('?') === -1 ? '?' : '&') + 'list_all=' + encodeURIComponent(facetName);

        return fetch(url, {
            method: 'GET',
            headers: headers,
            credentials: 'include'
        })
        .then(function (response) {
            var type = response.headers.get('content-type') || '';
            if (type.indexOf('application/json') !== -1) {
                return response.json();
            }
            return response.text();
        })
        .then(function (payload) {
            if (typeof payload === 'string') {
                return payload;
            }
            return payload[template] || payload['components/' + template] || '';
        });
    }

    function findInlineMore(html) {
        var holder;

        if (!html) return null;

        holder = document.createElement('div');
        holder.innerHTML = html;

        return holder.querySelector('.facetedSearch-inlineMore');
    }

    function replaceWithInlineMore(toggle, navList, inlineMore) {
        var accordionContent = navList.closest('.accordion-content');
        var existingSearch = accordionContent ? accordionContent.querySelector('.facetedSearch-inlineSearch') : null;
        var newList = inlineMore.querySelector('.navList');
        var newInput;

        if (newList) {
            newList.id = navList.id;
            newList.setAttribute('data-facet', navList.getAttribute('data-facet') || '');
            newList.setAttribute('data-has-more-results', 'false');
            newList.classList.add('facetedSearch-inlineList');
        }

        if (existingSearch && !existingSearch.closest('.facetedSearch-inlineMore')) {
            removeNode(existingSearch);
        }

        navList.parentNode.replaceChild(inlineMore, navList);
        removeNode(toggle);

        newInput = inlineMore.querySelector('.form-input');
        if (newInput) {
            newInput.focus();
        }

        return newInput;
    }

    function loadInlineFacet(toggle, navList, callback) {
        var facetName = navList.getAttribute('data-facet');
        var templates = buildTemplateList();
        var attempt = 0;

        if (!facetName) return;
        if (navList.getAttribute('data-inline-loading') === 'true') return;

        navList.setAttribute('data-inline-loading', 'true');

        function tryNextTemplate() {
            if (attempt >= templates.length) {
                navList.setAttribute('data-inline-loading', 'false');
                return;
            }

            var template = templates[attempt];
            attempt += 1;

            fetchShowMoreHtml(template, facetName)
                .then(function (html) {
                    var inlineMore = findInlineMore(html);

                    if (!inlineMore) {
                        tryNextTemplate();
                        return;
                    }

                    var newInput = replaceWithInlineMore(toggle, navList, inlineMore);

                    if (typeof callback === 'function') {
                        callback(newInput);
                    }
                })
                .catch(function () {
                    tryNextTemplate();
                });
        }

        tryNextTemplate();
    }

    function getNavListForInput(input) {
        var targetId = input.getAttribute('data-inline-search-target');
        var inlineMore = input.closest('.facetedSearch-inlineMore');
        var content;

        if (targetId) {
            return document.getElementById(targetId);
        }

        if (inlineMore) {
            return inlineMore.querySelector('.navList');
        }

        content = input.closest('.accordion-content');
        return content ? content.querySelector('.navList') : null;
    }

    function filterNavList(navList, query) {
        var items;

        if (!navList) return;

        items = navList.querySelectorAll('.navList-item');

        Array.prototype.forEach.call(items, function (item) {
            var text = (item.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
            item.style.display = text.indexOf(query) !== -1 ? '' : 'none';
        });
    }

    function expandFromSearchInput(input, callback) {
        var navList = getNavListForInput(input);
        var toggle;

        if (!navList) return false;
        if (navList.getAttribute('data-has-more-results') !== 'true') return false;

        toggle = document.querySelector('#facetedSearch .accordion-content .toggleLink[href="#' + navList.id + '"]');

        loadInlineFacet(toggle, navList, callback);
        return true;
    }

    function scheduleSetup(root) {
        window.clearTimeout(refreshTimer);
        refreshTimer = window.setTimeout(function () {
            applyDefaultSearches(root);
        }, 25);
    }

    document.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
        var toggle = event.target.closest('#facetedSearch .accordion-content .toggleLink[href^="#facetedSearch-navList--"]');
        var href;
        var navList;

        if (!toggle) return;

        href = toggle.getAttribute('href');
        if (!href) return;

        navList = document.querySelector(href);
        if (!navList) return;

        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();
        if (event.stopImmediatePropagation) {
            event.stopImmediatePropagation();
        }

        loadInlineFacet(toggle, navList);
    }, true);

    document.addEventListener('focusin', function (event) {
        var input = event.target.closest('#facetedSearch .facetedSearch-inlineSearch .form-input');
        if (!input) return;

        expandFromSearchInput(input);
    });

    document.addEventListener('input', function (event) {
        var input = event.target.closest('#facetedSearch .facetedSearch-inlineSearch .form-input');
        var query;
        var navList;

        if (!input) return;

        query = (input.value || '').toLowerCase();

        if (expandFromSearchInput(input, function (newInput) {
            if (!newInput) return;
            newInput.value = input.value;
            filterNavList(getNavListForInput(newInput), query);
        })) {
            return;
        }

        navList = getNavListForInput(input);
        filterNavList(navList, query);
    });

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            scheduleSetup(document);
        });
    } else {
        scheduleSetup(document);
    }

    var observerTarget =
        document.querySelector('#faceted-search-container') ||
        document.querySelector('#facetedSearch');

    if (observerTarget && 'MutationObserver' in window) {
        new MutationObserver(function () {
            scheduleSetup(observerTarget);
        }).observe(observerTarget, {
            childList: true,
            subtree: true
        });
    }
})();
</script>

 {{> components/custom/custom-js }}
 {{{footer.scripts}}}


    </body>
</html>
components/common/polyfill-script:
<script nonce="{{nonce}}">
    {{!--
        Check for modern browser features, and load polyfills if browser does not appear to support features
        we need.

            Polyfill approach is all or nothing - please import needed polyfills in /assets/js/polyfills.js

        Inspired by https://philipwalton.com/articles/loading-polyfills-only-when-needed/
            --}}
    function browserSupportsAllFeatures() {
        return window.Promise
            && window.fetch
            && window.URL
            && window.URLSearchParams
            && window.WeakMap
            // object-fit support
            && ('objectFit' in document.documentElement.style);
    }

    function loadScript(src) {
        var js = document.createElement('script');
        js.src = src;
        js.onerror = function () {
            console.error('Failed to load polyfill script ' + src);
        };
        document.head.appendChild(js);
    }

    if (!browserSupportsAllFeatures()) {
        loadScript('{{cdn 'assets/dist/theme-bundle.polyfills.js'}}');
    }
</script>
